description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly black and neon green color scheme. The front panel displays a large screen area, a control panel with a joystick and buttons, and a coin slot below, all framed by glowing green trim. The marquee at the top reads 'TEST TUBE TERRIER' in bright green, illuminated letters, and is flanked by additional green lighting accents. Both side panels are decorated with a grid pattern and the same 'TEST TUBE TERRIER' branding, giving the cabinet a cohesive, futuristic look. The back of the cabinet is plain black with two ventilation grilles and a lower access panel. The overall build appears sturdy, likely constructed from wood or MDF with plastic and metal components for the controls and trim.
description: A neon green and black upright arcade game cabinet with 'TEST TUBE TERRIER' branding, illuminated marquee, and a joystick/button control panel. Side panels feature matching graphics and the front includes a coin slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, coin slot, and illuminated marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green-trimmed profile and 'TEST TUBE TERRIER' side panel graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back with two ventilation grilles and an access panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching graphics and green trim.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and three buttons, arranged in a triangular pattern, with a green and black color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'TEST TUBE TERRIER' in bright green illuminated text on a black background, with glowing green accents and a science-themed motif.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a green grid pattern with the 'TEST TUBE TERRIER' logo in bright green, set against a dark background, evoking a high-tech, laboratory theme.
